content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-040)

## Headline
Terminal closeout, 4th consecutive. No closable in-cone sorry exists. Continue no-dispatch unless a
reverse signal arrives: (a) USER_HINTS opens cohomology scope, or (b) a genuine in-cone sorry surfaces.

## Do NOT re-assign (blocked, by design)
- `QuotScheme.lean` χ targets (L126/165/201/228): `hilbertPolynomial` + `quot_functor` + GR re-exports.
  χ/higher-cohomology-gated (body read iter-038: needs Σᵢ(−1)ⁱ dim Hⁱ + Snapper). Mathlib lacks the
  scheme-cohomology engine; out of this H⁰ leg. Fill at merge from the cohomology leg.
- `RelativeSpec.lean` (7 sorries): inherited parent code (iter-173–179 lineage), out-of-cone.
- Do NOT split `SectionGradedRing.lean` for "parallelism": axiom-clean, 0-sorry, no remaining proving.

## Deferred to merge (not this leg's debt)
- ~356 `lean_aux` unmatched coverage-debt nodes — inherited parent-blueprinted construction helpers
  (single-commit extraction `c53d9c9`). Re-blueprinting duplicates the parent = merge-time work.
- Blueprint-doctor (`logs/iter-040/blueprint-doctor.md`) findings, all on dormant out-of-cone inherited
  chapters: `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange` (2 phantom `covers` for non-existent `FlatBaseChange.lean` /
  `FlatBaseChangeGlobal.lean` + 13 broken `\ref`), `Picard_GlueDescent` (4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`),
  `Picard_QuotScheme` (13 broken `\cref`). Editing inherited chapters only creates merge conflicts —
  resolve at merge. No prover dispatched near them ⇒ phantom covers misroute nothing this iter.

## Reusable patterns
- None new this iter (no proving). Established patterns remain in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base +
  MEMORY.md auto-memory + `analogies/*.md`.
